title: OneUseMod
body:
### OneTimeMod

Small QOL mod for Hypixel SkyBlock.  
* Tells you if you already visited the server.  
* Displays Bacte Notification.  
* Shows on-screen notification on custom trigger.
* Has togglable `!warp` and `!bleggcoords`.
  * Option to auto disable `!warp` when in open party.

Default config keybind: `,`

## Commands

### `/oneusemod`

* Opens the configuration menu.

---

### `/oneusemod clearVisitedServers`

* Clears the list of previously visited servers.

---

### `/oneusemod notifications`

Sub-commands:

* **`/oneusemod notifications add "<trigger>" "<notification>"`**

  * Adds a new chat-triggered notification.

* **`/oneusemod notifications remove "<trigger>"`**

  * Removes all notifications with the given trigger.

* **`/oneusemod notifications clear`**

  * Deletes all notifications.

* **`/oneusemod notifications list`**

  * Displays all active notifications.

---

### `/oneusemod chatWarp`

* Command to toggle the `Chat Warp` option in the config.

### `/oneusemod setBleggCoords`

* Saves player coordinates as Blue Egg Coordinates. `(!bleggcoords uses current player coords by default)`

### `/oneusemod setBleggCoords <x> <y> <z>`

* Saves provided coordinates as Blue Egg Coordinates.

### `/oneusemod clearBleggCoords`

* Clears saved coords, uses current player coords.
